site.title: Riccardo Bozzato
site.tagline: Head of Operations | I scale teams, automate processes, and turn operational chaos into measurable dashboards (PMP®)
site.description: Head of Operations at Ciao Elsa. PMP® certified operations leader building security tools (VulnClaw) and SaaS boilerplates (Trova) in my spare time. I turn bottlenecks into predictable, data-driven processes.

home.heroTagline: I lead operations at Ciao Elsa and build security tools. When companies scale, operations either carry the growth or choke it. I make sure it's the first one.
home.featuredSubtitle: Tools I built because the existing ones weren't good enough.
home.aboutText: I'm Head of Operations at Ciao Elsa (pension-fund brokerage, Allianz partner), where I build scalable operational architectures — CRM, KPI systems, team governance — that let the company grow without breaking. PMP® certified. Outside work, I build VulnClaw (AI-driven penetration testing) and Trova (a SaaS boilerplate).
home.freebieTitle: Free: The AI Ops Security Playbook
home.freebieDesc: 5 strategies I use to keep operations secure without slowing innovation. No fluff, just tactics from the field.

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Tools I've built because the existing ones weren't good enough.

vulnclaw.title: VulnClaw
vulnclaw.subtitle: AI-Driven Penetration Testing CLI
vulnclaw.description: An intelligent CLI agent that automates security assessments. AI-powered reconnaissance, vulnerability scanning, and exploitation — all from your terminal.
features: Beautiful terminal UI with Rich and prompt_toolkit

trova.title: Trova
trova.subtitle: SaaS Boilerplate That Ships
trova.description: Next.js 16, Tailwind v4, Better Auth, Drizzle ORM, i18n, Resend emails, Stripe, shadcn/ui. Everything you need to launch a SaaS in days, not weeks.

panificio.title: Panificio Da Sergio
panificio.subtitle: Artisan Bakery & E-Commerce
panificio.description: A full-featured Next.js e-commerce site for a traditional Italian bakery. Product catalog, multi-language support, SEO-optimized, and online ordering. Built as a gift for family.

trova.title: Trova
trova.tagline: The SaaS boilerplate that actually ships.
trova.description: Stop rebuilding auth, emails, billing, and i18n for every project. Trova gives you a production-ready foundation so you can focus on what makes your SaaS unique.

features.auth: Better Auth — magic links, OAuth (Google, GitHub), 2FA, session management
features.email: Resend + React Email — beautiful transactional emails, 5 templates included
features.i18n: next-intl — English and Italian out of the box, easy to extend
features.billing: Stripe — subscription plans, webhooks, customer portal
features.ui: shadcn/ui + Tailwind v4 — dark mode, responsive, customizable

pricing.subtitle: One price. Everything included.
pricing.includes: Full source code, lifetime updates, priority support

about.title: About Riccardo
about.subtitle: Operations leader. Tool builder. Automation obsessive. PMP® certified.
about.intro: I'm Head of Operations at Ciao Elsa, a pension-fund brokerage and partner of Allianz. I manage 800+ active cases with a TrustScore of 4.9/5, real-time SLA dashboards, and a centralized knowledge management system that eliminated onboarding time.
story: I started in operations retail management at In's Mercato, Aldi, and Terranova — learning team leadership, shift planning, cost control, and operational KPIs on the ground. Then I moved into IT at Accenture, where I built web applications and introduced new operational procedures that delivered +30% efficiency and -15% administrative errors in the first quarter.

At Esse Solutions, I managed an enterprise digital project portfolio worth €500K+, coordinating distributed teams of 8-12 across BE/FE, UX/UI, and integrators on eCommerce B2B and PIM/DAM solutions. I introduced Agile processes that boosted team productivity by 25% and reduced time-to-market by 40%.

Today, as Head of Operations at Ciao Elsa, I build scalable operational architectures — CRM, KPI systems, team governance — that transform pension advisory complexity into automated processes. Outside work, I build VulnClaw (AI-driven pentesting) and Trova (SaaS boilerplate) because the best operators are also builders.
about.philosophy: Most companies struggle to grow because operations implode under the weight of new clients. My job is to make sure that doesn't happen. I combine methodological rigor (PMP®) with startup velocity, turning bottlenecks into predictable, data-driven processes.
